_notes: Per-clip animation library for the axial cooling fan. Currently one clip: blade_spin (rotor revolves around Y axis once over 120 frames). Add more clips by re-running spatail-animate-from-rest with new bake_* functions.

blade_spin.depicts: Rotor (7 blades + hub) revolving once around the airflow axis (Y). One full revolution per loop.

blade_spin: air is pushed through the housing
